scripts.setup:
set -e
ln -sfn "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/mobile/.env" apps/mobile/.env
ln -sfn "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/extension/.env" apps/extension/.env
ln -sfn "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/web/.env" apps/web/.env
pnpm install
scripts.run: export FORCE_COLOR=1 && pnpm --filter @salmon/extension dev & pnpm --filter @salmon/web dev & pnpm --filter @salmon/mobile ios & wait
